comment: Mean Green completed a patio project for us which had been only a vision.  From start to finish the project was handled with professionalism, care and kindness from all members of the team.  The patio, including installation of french doors, sod and sprinklers turned out awesome.  We were very pleased with the service.
draft_response: Thank you for sharing your experience, Janet. Knowing that the irrigation service met your expectations reinforces the standards we hold every crew to. We appreciate your trust in Black Hill Landscaping.
